DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/CAL: PC 1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS & RULING ON HOLDING ORDER/ARG&SUB/MO GRTD/X: MOTION GRANTED AS TO COUNT(S)2, 3, 4, 5, 6/X:COUNT 1, DISMISSED PURSUANT TO PC1385 IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE ON MOTION OF ADA LILI NGUYEN/
